title: sterculia venezuelensis
intro: Sterculia venezuelensis, also known as the Venezuelan sterculia, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of the plant are used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and are also said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
